evidence: Builds four groups of eight sin/cos-derived 3D points into the table at 0x005510ec..0x0055126c during GL startup.
Calls glViewport, switches to GL_PROJECTION, loads identity, and calls gluPerspective with width/height-derived aspect ratio.
Sets core GL state, seeds five texture IDs and uploads 256x256 RGBA blocks, configures fog/culling, then calls the viewport/projection helper.
Consumes MIDAS play status position, updates scene-change timing globals, and dispatches through the threshold table at 0x40e068 and the switch table at 0x4013fc.
Seeds demo and first-scene timing from GetTickCount, pumps PeekMessageA/GetMessageA/TranslateMessage/DispatchMessageA, polls midas06.dll MIDASgetPlayStatus, then renders and swaps buffers.
Creates the window, initializes MIDAS, shows the window, primes GL, then calls the main loop.
Window procedure handling WM_CREATE, WM_DESTROY, WM_SIZE, WM_PAINT, WM_CLOSE, WM_KEYDOWN, and WM_MOUSEMOVE.
Calls ChoosePixelFormat and SetPixelFormat, references setup error strings.
Loads the intro/logo texture group and reuses the dual-panel, soft-quad, and timed-fade helpers.
Loads v1/v2/txt1/txt2/logo/logotaus TGAs and uploads them via glTexImage2D.
Loads s1/s2/txt2 and reuses the same dual-panel helper as the intro family.
Loads s1/s2/txt2 textures and uploads them via glTexImage2D.
Loads kaar128/txt1/txt2 and calls the cached strip helper at 0x00403e40.
Loads kaar128/txt1/txt2 textures and uploads them via glTexImage2D.
Loops over per-element state buffers, reseeds values through the local PRNG helper, and uses fla/logotaus/txt1 textures.
Zeros effect buffers, loads fla/txt1/logotaus textures, and uploads them.
Loads surf128/fla/txt1, uses repeated quad loops, and shares the cached strip helper with the kaar family.
Loads surf128/fla/txt1 textures and uploads them via glTexImage2D.
Loads the shared quad textures, reuses the intro dual-panel helper, and ends in a dedicated timed fade helper.
Loads and uploads v1/v2/txt1/txt2 through a dedicated four-texture path used by the finale family.
Called with texture-slot pairs like (1,2) and (12,13), binds both textures, and emits a shared two-panel triangle primitive.
Uses a time-derived parameter, wraps it through 0x004040e0, modulates glColor4f, and draws a blended textured quad.
Alternates pseudo-randomized X/Y offsets through 0x004040b0 and draws a small blended overlay quad reused by every scene family.
Draws a centered blended quad with slightly inset texture coordinates, likely as a soft overlay or sprite helper.
Draws a centered textured quad from two float parameters and is used by the kaar family.
Builds and caches a 64-step sin/cos vertex strip, then draws it with glVertex3fv for the kaar and surf families.
Caches texture data by index and delegates to the raw TGA loader.
Reads 18-byte TGA header, allocates 0x40000 bytes, swaps BGR(A) to RGB(A).
Import thunk to MIDASplayModule.
Import thunk to MIDASloadModule.
Import thunk to MIDASstartBackgroundPlay.
Import thunk to MIDASinit.
Import thunk to MIDASstartup.
Implements a local linear-congruential generator and returns a masked 15-bit pseudo-random value.
Compiler-style x87 helper used by scene code to wrap a floating-point phase value into a smaller range.
References aab.xm and MIDAS load/play wrappers in window init path.
MSVC CRT startup path leading into the recovered main function.
